case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. JIMMY W TANG

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF PROPER VENUE (TRANSACTION ID # 210080307) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.
